starter_guildlands.description: The organized starter region for Shattered Realms, covering the guildhall crossing, civic halls, training spaces, market, tavern, roads, farms, forest edge, watchpost, and rat cellar used by new characters.
starter_guildlands.name: Starter Guildlands
